workflow_name: Pipeline A - Flow-Warp with v0.8 Quality Improvements
description: Complete Pipeline A workflow demonstrating all v0.8 quality enhancements: raised cosine tile blending, color matching, adaptive temporal blending with scene cut detection, and joint bilateral flow upsampling with edge detection.

nodes.title: Load Low-Res Video
nodes.tooltip: Load AI-generated video (e.g., from Runway, Pika, Stable Video Diffusion). Typical resolution: 720p-1080p.

nodes.title: Extract Optical Flow (SEA-RAFT)
nodes.tooltip: SEA-RAFT (ECCV 2024) - 2.3x faster than RAFT, 22% more accurate. Auto-downloads from HuggingFace on first use. Confidence map is used by adaptive temporal blending.

nodes.title: Load High-Res Still
nodes.tooltip: Load ultra-high-resolution still image (4K-32K). Motion from video will be transferred to this image.

nodes.title: Upscale Flow with Edge-Aware Refinement (v0.8)
nodes.tooltip: NEW v0.8: Joint bilateral upsampling prevents flow bleeding across edges. Canny edge detection preserves sharp boundaries. Much better than legacy guided filtering.

nodes.title: Convert Flow to STMap
nodes.tooltip: Convert accumulated flow vectors to normalized STMap coordinates for warping.

nodes.title: Warp with Raised Cosine Blending (v0.8)
nodes.tooltip: NEW v0.8: Raised cosine (Hann window) eliminates visible seams. Color matching fixes exposure discontinuities. Set blend_mode='linear' for legacy behavior.

nodes.title: Adaptive Temporal Stabilization (v0.8)
nodes.tooltip: NEW v0.8: Adaptive blending uses confidence + motion magnitude. Prevents ghosting in fast motion, reduces flicker in slow motion. Scene cut detection prevents blending across shot changes.

nodes.title: Export Final Sequence
nodes.tooltip: Write 16K frames to disk. Use FFmpeg to encode: ffmpeg -framerate 24 -i frame_%04d.png -c:v libx264 -preset slow -crf 18 output.mp4

quality_improvements: Raised cosine tile blending eliminates seams
Joint bilateral flow upsampling prevents edge bleeding
Canny edge detection preserves sharp boundaries
Adaptive temporal blending reduces flicker without ghosting
Scene cut detection prevents cross-scene artifacts
